channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bregman's $120 million, 3-year deal with Red Sox includes $60 million deferred, paid from 2035-46
item.description: Alex Bregman could receive the final payment of his $120 million, three-year deal with the Boston Red Sox in 2046.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Devers insists he's the Red Sox's third baseman even with Bregman now on the team
item.description: FORT MYERS, Fla. (AP) — The Red Sox's ballyhooed signing of Alex Bregman was met with considerable resistance Monday when Rafael Devers said he wouldn't cede third base.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Canadian national anthem booed, but only lightly, at 4 Nations hockey tournament
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Canadian national anthem was booed, though somewhat tepidly, by the fans at the 4 Nations Face-Off on Monday — apparent payback for the jeering of “The Star-Spangled Banner” during the opening rounds in Montreal last week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn stays at No. 1 in AP Top 25 for 6th straight week, Florida up to No. 2; Louisville returns
item.description: Auburn's win at Alabama assured the Tigers would keep the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men's college basketball poll for a sixth consecutive week.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Stanton hasn't swung bat in 3 or 4 weeks and is unsure of whether he can play in opener
item.description: New York Yankees slugger Giancarlo Stanton hasn’t swung a bat in three or four weeks and isn’t sure whether he will be ready for opening day because of painful tendinitis in both elbows.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NCS basketball playoffs 2025: What to know after Sunday’s seeding meeting
item.description: Boys Open includes DLS, Salesian but not Dougherty Valley; Acalanes, SRV favorites in girls Open. Plus, much more.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Shaw performs Black Power salute after goal for Man City Women following racist abuse
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Khadija ‘Bunny’ Shaw bowed her head and raised a gloved fist after scoring a goal on her first start for Manchester City Women since pulling out of the team because of racist abuse directed at her on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The winning total last year: 211 points. The winning total this year: 41 points. An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Owner/driver Jimmie Johnson notches his best Daytona 500 finish since winning the race in 2013
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Jimmie Johnson was simultaneously relieved and overwhelmed as he climbed out of his No. 84 Toyota at Daytona International Speedway on Sunday night. It was a different set of emotions for the seven-time NASCAR champion and the two-time Daytona 500 winner.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hamlin expected a late caution would give him a 4th Daytona 500 win. NASCAR never threw the yellow
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Denny Hamlin surged into the lead on the final lap of the Daytona 500 and thought he had a fourth victory in “The Great American Race” within his reach Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Illinois botches Terrence Shannon Jr jersey retirement ceremony with hilarious gaffe during unveiling
item.description: The University of Illinois had a huge gaffe during the jersey retirement ceremony for Terrence Shannon Jr. on Saturday, as his jersey was seen upside down during unveiling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 48, The Bishop's School 37
item.description: A big time coastal league matchup between SFC and Bishop's in boys basketball. The last time these 2 teams faced off the SFC Eagles won by just 2 points.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5
